summary: Add force/re-embed flag to embed_corpus.py so all chunks are re-embedded regardless of existing vector

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: --reindex already lands as part of todo:4407f39f's embed_corpus.py rewrite. Behavior matrix: no flags = full re-embed (default, INSERT OR REPLACE overwrites everything); --resume = skip already-embedded; --resume --reindex = overrides the resume skip (back to full re-embed); --reindex alone = identical to default. No additional code change needed.

resolution.note: Resolved by the 4407f39f rewrite: --reindex exists and the default (no flags) is already a full re-embed thanks to INSERT OR REPLACE semantics. Verified flag matrix above.
